tabs.content:
// step 1 - create demo assets
.execute database script <| 
.create table Counter_raw (Data:dynamic)
.show table Counter_raw policy streamingingestion
.show database policy streamingingestion //if IsEnabled = true, table will inherit database policy.
.alter table Counter_raw policy streamingingestion enable //not required if already enabled for the db. 

// get bcdr1 > eh1 clus uri
print current_cluster_endpoint(), current_database()

// run streaming ingestion client (once)

Counter_raw
| count

Counter_raw
| where ingestion_time() > ago(1s)
| take 10 

Counter_raw
| where ingestion_time() > ago(1m)
| extend DeviceName = tostring(Data.Device.ComputerName), MachineGuid = tostring(Data.Device.MachineGuid)
| where isnotempty(MachineGuid)

// run streaming ingestion client (infinite loop)

Counter_raw
| count //growing

.show database policy caching //infinite is default, well 36500d = 100yrs :)

.alter database EH1 policy caching hot = 30m

.show table Counter_raw policy retention

.alter table Counter_raw policy retention ```{"SoftDeletePeriod": "1.00:00:00", "Recoverability": "Disabled"}``` //WARNING: This is just a demo, do NOT disable Recoverability on your tables!!!

// create EH1 on BCDR2
// run onelake sync... what happens?
tabs.title: Tab
